sentences.arabic: الصِّدْقُ مِنْ أَعْظَمِ أَخْلَاقِ الْمُسْلِمِ فِي حَيَاتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Istinoljubivost je jedna od najvećih moralnih osobina muslimana u njegovom životu.
sentences.translationEn: Honesty is one of the greatest morals of a Muslim in his life.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: "عَلَيْكُمْ بِالصِّدْقِ، فَإِنَّ الصِّدْقَ يَهْدِي إِلَى الْبِرِّ" [رَوَاهُ مُسْلِمٌ فِي كِتَابِ الْبِرِّ وَالصِّلَةِ، رَقْمُ 2607].
sentences.translation: Allahov Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, je rekao: "Držite se istine, jer istina vodi ka dobročinstvu" [Bilježi Muslim u Knjizi o dobročinstvu i održavanju veza, br. 2607].
sentences.translationEn: The Messenger of Allah (peace be upon him) said: "Adhere to truthfulness, for truthfulness leads to righteousness" [Reported by Muslim in the Book of Virtue and Joining Ties, No. 2607].

sentences.arabic: الصَّادِقُ يَحْتَرِمُهُ النَّاسُ وَيُحِبُّهُ اللهُ سُبْحَانَهُ وَتَعَالَى.
sentences.translation: Istinoljubivog čovjeka ljudi poštuju, a Allah, subhanehu ve te'ala, ga voli.
sentences.translationEn: People respect a truthful person, and Allah, Glorified and Exalted be He, loves him.

sentences.arabic: الْكَذِبُ صِفَةٌ سَيِّئَةٌ تَضُرُّ الْمُجْتَمَعَ وَتُبْعِدُ الْإِنْسَانَ عَنِ الْجَنَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Laž je loša osobina koja šteti društvu i udaljava čovjeka od Dženneta.
sentences.translationEn: Lying is a bad trait that harms society and distances a person from Paradise.

sentences.arabic: يَلْتَزِمُ الْمُؤْمِنُ بِقَوْلِ الْحَقِّ فِي كُلِّ الظُّرُوفِ.
sentences.translation: Vjernik se pridržava govorenja istine u svim okolnostima.
sentences.translationEn: A believer commits to speaking the truth in all circumstances.
